# KBBG - Korean Beauty Buyers Guide
> AI-powered Korean beauty and medical tourism guide supporting 8 languages.

## About
KBBG (Korean Beauty Buyers Guide) helps international visitors find the best beauty clinics, cosmetic procedures, and skincare products in South Korea. We provide AI-powered clinic recommendations, face analysis, real-time cosmetics rankings, and a multilingual community forum.

## Key Features
- AI Clinic Search: Natural language search for Korean beauty clinics by specialty, location, and procedure type
- AI Face Analysis: Upload a selfie to get personalized K-beauty style recommendations
- Clinic Database: Verified Korean medical clinics with ratings, reviews, and multilingual support info
- Cosmetics Rankings: Weekly top 20 from Olive Young, Glowpick, Hwahae, and Naver Shopping
- Community Forum: Multilingual discussion board for sharing medical tourism experiences
- Expert Consultation: Direct consultation request to clinic recommendation specialists

## Supported Languages
English, Korean, Japanese, Chinese (Simplified), Vietnamese, Thai, Russian, Mongolian

## Main Pages
- /en/ - Homepage with AI search, face analysis, clinic finder
- /en/recommend - AI-powered clinic recommendation
- /en/hospitals - Clinic search with filters
- /en/community - Community forum
- /en/cosmetics - K-beauty product rankings
- /en/guides - Medical procedure guides (38 procedures across 10 specialties)
- /en/safety - Safety information for medical tourists
- /en/procedures - Common procedures guide
- /en/faq - Frequently asked questions
- /en/live - Live Korea street cameras
- /en/contact - Contact and consultation

## Contact
Website: https://kbeautybuyersguide.com
